content.en:
"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi has achieved the peak of the nine-star gods, and the !!"

Peng Yu Tianjun and the others of the Void Heaven Hall were shocked, although the nine-star peak god general was only one grade stronger than the nine-star late god general, but the meaning of the representation was different!

It is difficult for a nine-star god general to upgrade every level, and the value of ten nine-star late-stage god generals is far inferior to that of a nine-star peak god general, which is a qualitative gap.

I don't know how many peerless Tianjiao tried in vain to impact from the nine-star late stage god general to the nine-star peak god general, but they all failed, delayed hundreds of millions of years, and finally had no choice but to impact the realm of the Mandate of Heaven and gave up the realm of the nine-star peak god general.

At this moment, Peng Yu Tianjun and the others realized that Ye Tian's status had risen to a notch again, far surpassing the other Dao Ancestor Descendants and True Disciples.

Moreover, even if Ye Tian can't become a Dao Ancestor in the future, he will definitely be one of the strongest True Ancestors.

When the Yunzi Divine Maiden of the God of War Tower learned that Ye Tian had become a nine-star peak god general, she couldn't help but sigh and completely gave up chasing Ye Tian.

However, the Yunzi Divine Maiden did not feel that her future was weaker than Ye Tian's, after all, the nine-star peak divine general was the limit of the divine general, no matter how strong Ye Tian was, it was only the nine-star peak.

Even if Ye Tian's cultivation speed is fast, she still has the hope of reaching the nine-star peak god general, but it will take a long time, and one day, she will be able to sit on an equal footing with Ye Tian.

......

When many people in the outside world were talking about how Ye Tian was detached, Ye Tian continued to comprehend and cultivate, impacting the level of the Ten Star Divine General.

Year after year passed, and Ye Tian never tried to detach, which aroused the suspicion of many people.

Some people think that Ye Tian is consolidating his foundation, some people think that Ye Tian is trying to comprehend a certain secret technique, which is a secret technique that can only be practiced at the level of a god general, and some people even think that Ye Tian has used the method of exhausting his potential to ascend to the peak of the Nine Stars, and there is no way to transcend it at the moment.

Of course, those who deliberately slandered Ye Tian were only a very small minority, and no one took it seriously.

There is only one person who really knows Ye Tian's situation, and that is the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

In a retreat chamber.

Ye Tian cultivated a sect of chaotic supernatural powers, condensed the prototype of the Great Dao, and then engraved the Dao pattern.

The inscription of 60 Dao patterns is the culmination of the Void Heaven Dao Body, if the Void Heaven Dao Body is perfect, what level will his strength be raised?

In Ye Tian's opinion, it was definitely possible to break through the shackles and reach the level of a ten-star god general.

So, Ye Tian began to engrave a stripe.

The 61st stripe inscription is successful!

The 62nd stripe inscription is successful!

......

When the 72nd Dao Pattern was successfully inscribed, Ye Tian's Void Heaven Dao Body attracted another great transformation, almost reaching the ultimate level of a nine-star god general, but still not reaching the level of a ten-star god general.

So, Ye Tian continued to cultivate and engraved the Dao pattern.

10,000 years and 10,000 years have passed, Ye Tian has not gone to detachment, and gradually Ye Tian has become a legend for many people, and not many people talk about Ye Tian anymore, but more about which peerless Tianjiao was born in the great universe, who has impacted the half-step true spirit realm and other topics.

I don't know if it's a problem of resistance, Ye Tian's difficulty in condensing the prototype of the Great Dao and inscribed the Dao pattern is getting bigger and bigger, and the time it takes is getting longer and longer.

100,000 years!

500,000 years!

A million years!

After another 1.5 million years of retreat, Ye Tian finally engraved a full 99 Dao patterns, and finally led to an unimaginable transformation.

At this moment, the consciousness incarnation of the Void Heaven Dao Body descended and enveloped Ye Tian's retreat room.

"Break through quietly, don't worry about being a teacher!"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestral Dao.

Ye Tian nodded and broke through wholeheartedly.

After a long time, the transformation of the Void Heaven Dao Body was completed, and it was much stronger than before.

And Ye Tian also felt that his strength had also broken through the limit, and he officially stepped into the ranks of the Ten Star Divine Generals.

"Master!"

Ye Tian stood up and bowed respectfully to the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

"Ye Tian, you are very good, you have stepped into the ranks of the Ten Star Divine Generals in such a short period of time, I originally thought that it would take you hundreds of millions of years to have a glimmer of hope to step into this level. The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said with a slight surprise.

"The disciple is just a fluke!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

"You don't need to be modest, if you can become a ten-star god general, there is no fluke. However, I used special means to shield the ancestral monument's induction to you, so the ancestral monument could not know that you had become a ten-star god general for the time being. You don't have to leak out the strength of your Ten Star Divine General, otherwise you will be in great trouble!" reminded the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

"Why?"

Ye Tian asked.

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor explained: "Because you are so good, although the nine-star peak god generals are rare, at least one will be born in a great era, and even in the event of a glorious great era, it is very normal to give birth to several." But the birth of the ten-star god general is often a miracle that can only be born in countless eras. Since the history of Chaos, there have not been many times that the Ten Star God Generals have appeared, but there are only a few Ten Star God Generals who have grown up in the end, and most of the Ten Star God Generals have fallen and were killed before they grew up. If many forces know that you are a ten-star god general, do you know how many people will want to kill you and don't want you to grow up!"

When Ye Tian heard this, he was immediately shocked.

"Transcend as soon as possible, and then break through to the Heavenly Mandate Realm, so that no one will know that you have become a ten-star god general. "

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor reminded.

"Yes, Master!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor left.

------------

Ye Tian's strength reached the ten-star god general, but he did not immediately go to transcendence, but continued to cultivate, wanting to condense the prototype of the Great Dao and inscribe the Dao pattern.

He felt that his Void Heaven Dao Body had still not reached the true perfection realm, even if his strength broke the shackles, he could still continue to improve.

Sure enough, tens of thousands of years passed, and Ye Tian finally engraved another pattern, but his strength did not improve.

After reaching the ten-star god general, no matter how much you improve, you still have so much strength, this is the real limit.

However, the more Dao Patterns, the higher the foundation, and the stronger the potential, which is a good thing, so Ye Tian will naturally continue to engrave Dao Patterns.

Article 101!

Article 102!

Article 103!

Article 104!

......

It took 500,000 years for Ye Tian to finally engrave the 108th Dao pattern.

At this moment, Ye Tian truly felt the meaning of the Great Perfection.

His Void Dao Body was complete, and the Dao Pattern and his body were perfectly integrated, and he could no longer reveal the slightest, and completed the final perfect transformation.

But the strength is still a ten-star god general, and there is no change.

But Ye Tian knew very well that his defense had reached an incredible level, even if it was someone else who was also a ten-star god general, he didn't want to break his defense.

Moreover, he is almost immortal.

With the Void Heaven Dao Body and the Blood River Immortal Technique, I am afraid that no one among the Heavenly Monarchs can kill him, even if he is the first person on the Heavenly Monarch List.
